queries: E2E pipeline Scheduling and Monitoring Data Pipelines 2023 authoritative sources
action.query: E2E pipeline Scheduling and Monitoring Data Pipelines 2023 authoritative sources

annotations.title: End-to-end Pipeline Monitoring | The GitLab Handbook
What is Pipeline Monitoring & Alerting? | Pipeline Monitoring & Alerting - System Overflow
E2E DevOps Pipeline with GitLab - IBM Mediacenter
Towards Next Generation Data Engineering Pipelines
Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors

content.text:
Monitoring and scheduling are critical components in managing end-to-end (E2E) data pipelines, ensuring their reliability and efficiency. Here are several authoritative and recent sources that provide valuable insights into these practices:

1. **GitLab's End-to-End Pipeline Monitoring**: GitLab outlines its approach to monitoring E2E test pipelines, detailing scheduled runs, test types, and integration with Slack for real-time notifications. This resource offers practical examples of pipeline monitoring strategies. ([handbook.gitlab.com](https://handbook.gitlab.com/handbook/engineering/testing/end-to-end-pipeline-monitoring/?utm_source=openai))

2. **GitLab's End-to-End Testing Guide**: This guide provides an in-depth look at E2E testing strategies, including the setup of scheduled pipelines for nightly builds and staging tests. It also discusses testing code in merge requests, offering a comprehensive understanding of E2E testing within GitLab. ([docs.gitlab.com](https://docs.gitlab.com/development/testing_guide/end_to_end/?utm_source=openai))

3. **SAP's Data Pipeline Monitoring**: SAP's documentation describes the monitoring dashboard within the SAP Data Hub cockpit, which allows users to track the status of data pipelines, including visual representations and real-time updates. ([help.sap.com](https://help.sap.com/doc/b31ca3800b054842af86706c2ca16baf/1.3.latest/en-us/2597449d314141d585452dad48a1f658.html?utm_source=openai))

4. **System Overflow's Overview of Pipeline Monitoring & Alerting**: This article explains the importance of monitoring and alerting in data pipelines, emphasizing the need to detect failures, performance issues, and data quality problems. It discusses key metrics to monitor and the role of alerting in proactive issue resolution. ([systemoverflow.com](https://www.systemoverflow.com/learn/data-pipelines-orchestration/pipeline-monitoring-alerting/what-is-pipeline-monitoring-alerting?utm_source=openai))

5. **Aliz's MLOps E2E Pipeline Blueprint**: Aliz presents a comprehensive tool designed to build end-to-end machine learning pipelines, highlighting features like CI/CD configuration, model tracking, and secure model publishing. This resource is particularly useful for those integrating machine learning into their data pipelines. ([aliz.ai](https://www.aliz.ai/en/blueprints/ml-e2-e-pipeline?utm_source=openai))

6. **IBM's E2E DevOps Pipeline with GitLab**: IBM demonstrates the implementation of an E2E DevOps pipeline using GitLab, showcasing integration across various phases of the application lifecycle, from coding to monitoring. This video provides practical insights into building and managing E2E pipelines. ([mediacenter.ibm.com](https://mediacenter.ibm.com/media/E2E%2BDevOps%2BPipeline%2Bwith%2BGitLab/1_gds3ux8t?utm_source=openai))

7. **Towards Next Generation Data Engineering Pipelines**: This academic paper discusses the evolution of data engineering pipelines, proposing levels of optimization, self-awareness, and self-adaptation. It offers a forward-looking perspective on the future of data pipeline management. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2507.13892?utm_source=openai))

8. **Strategies for Optimizing End-to-End Artificial Intelligence Pipelines on Intel Xeon Processors**: This research paper presents optimization strategies for E2E AI pipelines, focusing on performance improvements across various stages, including data preprocessing and model training. It provides insights into hardware and software optimizations for efficient pipeline execution. ([arxiv.org](https://arxiv.org/abs/2211.00286?utm_source=openai))

These resources offer a blend of practical guides, case studies, and theoretical frameworks to enhance your understanding and implementation of scheduling and monitoring in E2E data pipelines.
